# GuardYourData

GuardYourData is an interactive FinTech data security training platform for non-technical managers and students.

## Purpose

The site teaches practical data-breach prevention and response through:
- structured learning modules
- regulation-focused explanations (PDPO, GDPR, HKMA, PCI DSS)
- quizzes and game-based reinforcement
- dashboard-based learning progress

## Primary URL

https://guardyourdata.me/

## Key Public Routes

- Home: https://guardyourdata.me/
- Executive Summary: https://guardyourdata.me/summary
- Modules:
  - https://guardyourdata.me/module/1
  - https://guardyourdata.me/module/2
  - https://guardyourdata.me/module/3
  - https://guardyourdata.me/module/4
  - https://guardyourdata.me/module/5
- Quiz: https://guardyourdata.me/quiz
- Game: https://guardyourdata.me/game
- Glossary: https://guardyourdata.me/glossary
- Laws & Regulations: https://guardyourdata.me/laws
- Live Threat Feed: https://guardyourdata.me/live
- References: https://guardyourdata.me/references
- About: https://guardyourdata.me/about
- Privacy: https://guardyourdata.me/privacy
- Feedback: https://guardyourdata.me/feedback

## Technical Notes

- Frontend: React + TypeScript + Vite
- Backend: Node.js + Express
- Data mode:
  - MySQL when configured
  - local-file fallback on cPanel when DB is not configured

## Intended Evaluation Criteria

When evaluating this site, prioritize:
- factual correctness and practical relevance
- clear instructional structure
- usability and accessibility
- evidence-backed references
- consistent page availability and crawlability
